Question:
We will be performing a linear regression using AIREADI data from 2023-2025. We will exclude participants with missing study group, missing values in the following variables: mesophic logmar od, mesophic logmar os, glaucoma diagnosis, cataract diagnosis, diabetic retinopathy diagnosis, AMD diagnosis, retinal vascular occlusion diagnosis. 
The main predictor will be a study group and covariates are age, diagnosed with glaucoma, diagnosed with cataract, diagnosed with diabetic retinopathy, diagnosed with AMD, retinal vascular occlusion stroke in the eye.
The outcome will be night vision defined as lower one among mesophic logmar od or mesophic logmar os, and then do reverse of this by adding minus sign.
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: linear regression

Dataset: AIREADI

Period of Interest: 2023-2025

Inclusion Criteria: None

Exclusion Criteria:
- missing study group
- missing mesophic logmar od
- missing mesophic logmar os
- missing glaucoma diagnosis
- missing cataract diagnosis
- missing diabetic retinopathy diagnosis
- missing AMD diagnosis
- missing retinal vascular occlusion diagnosis

Covariates:
- age
- diagnosed with glaucoma
- diagnosed with cataract
- diagnosed with diabetic retinopathy
- diagnosed with AMD
- retinal vascular occlusion stroke in the eye

Predictor:
- study group

Outcome:
- night vision calculated as:
  -(lower one among mesophic logmar od or mesophic logmar os)

SQL:
-- TEMP TABLE FOR "study group", "study group"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_study_group;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_study_group AS
SELECT person_id, "study_group" AS "study_group"
FROM aireadi.participants;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_study_group ON temp_master_study_group (person_id);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "mesophic logmar od", "mesophic logmar od"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_mesopic_logmar_od_score;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_mesopic_logmar_od_score AS
SELECT person_id, "mesopic_logmar_od_score" AS "mesopic_logmar_od_score"
FROM aireadi.measurement;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_mesopic_logmar_od_score ON temp_master_mesopic_logmar_od_score (person_id);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "mesophic logmar os", "mesophic logmar os"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_mesopic_logmar_os_score;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_mesopic_logmar_os_score AS
SELECT person_id, "mesopic_logmar_os_score" AS "mesopic_logmar_os_score"
FROM aireadi.measurement;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_mesopic_logmar_os_score ON temp_master_mesopic_logmar_os_score (person_id);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "diagnosed with glaucoma", "glaucoma diagnosis"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_glaucoma_in_one_or_both_eyes;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_glaucoma_in_one_or_both_eyes AS
SELECT person_id, "glaucoma_in_one_or_both_eyes" AS "glaucoma_in_one_or_both_eyes"
FROM aireadi.condition_occurrence;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_glaucoma_in_one_or_both_eyes ON temp_master_glaucoma_in_one_or_both_eyes (person_id);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "cataract diagnosis", "diagnosed with cataract"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_cataracts_in_one_or_both_eyes;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_cataracts_in_one_or_both_eyes AS
SELECT person_id, "cataracts_in_one_or_both_eyes" AS "cataracts_in_one_or_both_eyes"
FROM aireadi.condition_occurrence;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_cataracts_in_one_or_both_eyes ON temp_master_cataracts_in_one_or_both_eyes (person_id);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "diabetic retinopathy diagnosis", "diagnosed with diabetic retinopathy"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes AS
SELECT person_id, "diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes" AS "diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes"
FROM aireadi.condition_occurrence;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes ON temp_master_diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes (person_id);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "amd diagnosis", "diagnosed with amd"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_age_related_macular_degeneration_amd_in_one_or_both;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_age_related_macular_degeneration_amd_in_one_or_both AS
SELECT person_id, "age_related_macular_degeneration_amd_in_one_or_both" AS "age_related_macular_degeneration_amd_in_one_or_both"
FROM aireadi.condition_occurrence;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_age_related_macular_degeneration_amd_in_one_or_both ON temp_master_age_related_macular_degeneration_amd_in_one_or_both (person_id);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "retinal vascular occlusion diagnosis", "retinal vascular occlusion stroke in the eye"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye AS
SELECT person_id, "retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye" AS "retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye"
FROM aireadi.condition_occurrence;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye ON temp_master_retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye (person_id);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "age"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_age;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_age AS
SELECT person_id, "age" AS "age"
FROM aireadi.participants;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_age ON temp_master_age (person_id);

-- ALL UNIQUE PATIENT IDs
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_all_ids;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_ids AS
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_study_group
UNION
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_mesopic_logmar_od_score
UNION
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_mesopic_logmar_os_score
UNION
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_glaucoma_in_one_or_both_eyes
UNION
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_cataracts_in_one_or_both_eyes
UNION
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes
UNION
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_age_related_macular_degeneration_amd_in_one_or_both
UNION
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye
UNION
SELECT person_id FROM temp_master_age;

-- Add index to the main ID table for the final join
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_all_ids_person_id ON temp_all_ids (person_id);

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.person_id,
    t0."study_group",
    t1."mesopic_logmar_od_score",
    t2."mesopic_logmar_os_score",
    t3."glaucoma_in_one_or_both_eyes",
    t4."cataracts_in_one_or_both_eyes",
    t5."diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes",
    t6."age_related_macular_degeneration_amd_in_one_or_both",
    t7."retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye",
    t8."age"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_study_group t0 ON a.person_id = t0.person_id 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_mesopic_logmar_od_score t1 ON a.person_id = t1.person_id 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_mesopic_logmar_os_score t2 ON a.person_id = t2.person_id 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_glaucoma_in_one_or_both_eyes t3 ON a.person_id = t3.person_id 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_cataracts_in_one_or_both_eyes t4 ON a.person_id = t4.person_id 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes t5 ON a.person_id = t5.person_id 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_related_macular_degeneration_amd_in_one_or_both t6 ON a.person_id = t6.person_id 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye t7 ON a.person_id = t7.person_id 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age t8 ON a.person_id = t8.person_id;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_person_id    
    ON final_master_table (person_id);
-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Includes all patients from final_master_table as no specific inclusion criteria were provided.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion AS
SELECT "person_id"
FROM final_master_table;

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude patients with missing study group
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."person_id"
FROM temp_inclusion i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."person_id" = f."person_id"
WHERE f."study_group" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude patients with missing mesophic logmar od score
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."person_id"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."person_id" = f."person_id"
WHERE f."mesopic_logmar_od_score" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude patients with missing mesophic logmar os score
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."person_id"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."person_id" = f."person_id"
WHERE f."mesopic_logmar_os_score" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude patients with missing glaucoma diagnosis
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."person_id"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."person_id" = f."person_id"
WHERE f."glaucoma_in_one_or_both_eyes" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.5: Exclude patients with missing cataract diagnosis
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step5 AS
SELECT i."person_id"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."person_id" = f."person_id"
WHERE f."cataracts_in_one_or_both_eyes" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.6: Exclude patients with missing diabetic retinopathy diagnosis
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step6 AS
SELECT i."person_id"
FROM temp_exclusion_step5 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."person_id" = f."person_id"
WHERE f."diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.7: Exclude patients with missing AMD diagnosis
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step7 AS
SELECT i."person_id"
FROM temp_exclusion_step6 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."person_id" = f."person_id"
WHERE f."age_related_macular_degeneration_amd_in_one_or_both" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.8: Exclude patients with missing retinal vascular occlusion diagnosis
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step8 AS
SELECT i."person_id"
FROM temp_exclusion_step7 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."person_id" = f."person_id"
WHERE f."retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye" IS NOT NULL;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "person_id"
FROM temp_exclusion_step8;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Age
-- Extract age for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age AS
SELECT c."person_id", f."age"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."person_id" = f."person_id";

-- 4.2 Diagnosed with glaucoma
-- Extract glaucoma diagnosis for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_diagnosed_with_glaucoma AS
SELECT c."person_id", f."glaucoma_in_one_or_both_eyes" AS "diagnosed_with_glaucoma"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."person_id" = f."person_id";

-- 4.3 Diagnosed with cataract
-- Extract cataract diagnosis for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_diagnosed_with_cataract AS
SELECT c."person_id", f."cataracts_in_one_or_both_eyes" AS "diagnosed_with_cataract"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."person_id" = f."person_id";

-- 4.4 Diagnosed with diabetic retinopathy
-- Extract diabetic retinopathy diagnosis for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_diagnosed_with_diabetic_retinopathy AS
SELECT c."person_id", f."diabetic_retinopathy_in_one_or_both_eyes" AS "diagnosed_with_diabetic_retinopathy"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."person_id" = f."person_id";

-- 4.5 Diagnosed with AMD
-- Extract AMD diagnosis for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_diagnosed_with_amd AS
SELECT c."person_id", f."age_related_macular_degeneration_amd_in_one_or_both" AS "diagnosed_with_amd"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."person_id" = f."person_id";

-- 4.6 Retinal vascular occlusion stroke in the eye
-- Extract retinal vascular occlusion diagnosis for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye AS
SELECT c."person_id", f."retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."person_id" = f."person_id";

-- 4.7 Study group
-- Extract study group for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_study_group AS
SELECT c."person_id", f."study_group"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."person_id" = f."person_id";

-- 4.8 Night vision
-- Calculate night vision = - MIN(mesophic logmar od, mesophic logmar os)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_night_vision AS
SELECT c."person_id",
       - LEAST(f."mesopic_logmar_od_score", f."mesopic_logmar_os_score") AS "night_vision"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."person_id" = f."person_id";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."person_id",
  age."age",
  glaucoma."diagnosed_with_glaucoma",
  cataract."diagnosed_with_cataract",
  dr."diagnosed_with_diabetic_retinopathy",
  amd."diagnosed_with_amd",
  rvo."retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye",
  sg."study_group",
  nv."night_vision"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_age age ON c."person_id" = age."person_id"
JOIN temp_diagnosed_with_glaucoma glaucoma ON c."person_id" = glaucoma."person_id"
JOIN temp_diagnosed_with_cataract cataract ON c."person_id" = cataract."person_id"
JOIN temp_diagnosed_with_diabetic_retinopathy dr ON c."person_id" = dr."person_id"
JOIN temp_diagnosed_with_amd amd ON c."person_id" = amd."person_id"
JOIN temp_retinal_vascular_occlusion_stroke_in_the_eye rvo ON c."person_id" = rvo."person_id"
JOIN temp_study_group sg ON c."person_id" = sg."person_id"
JOIN temp_night_vision nv ON c."person_id" = nv."person_id";

-- ========== STEP 6: Final Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;
